modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Security error prevents login to Self Service Banner.

full_description_text: The student worker is trying to log in. They see an error message. It says "Sorry, the server received an internal error." Another message says "Security error. Login not successful." They need help from the System Administrator.
short_description: Security error prevents login to Self Service Banner.
description: The student worker is trying to log in. They see an error message. It says "Sorry, the server received an internal error." Another message says "Security error. Login not successful." They need help from the System Administrator.
